headline: Malaysia Detains 12 Foreign Intelligence Operatives in 2025
context: MEIO and Special Branch detained 12 foreign intelligence operatives from 4 countries conducting espionage on Malaysian soil in 2025.

cards.big: 12 foreign intelligence operatives detained from 4 countries in 2025
cards.sub: Highest number of espionage-related detentions in Malaysian history

cards.big: 5 operatives targeted military installations and defence procurement data
cards.sub: 2 were diplomatic staff expelled under persona non grata protocols

cards.big: 4 operatives conducted technical surveillance on telecommunications infrastructure
cards.sub: Equipment seized included military-grade interception devices worth RM8 million

cards.big: 3 operatives posed as business executives with legitimate corporate covers
cards.sub: Government chose not to publicly name the countries involved

cards.big: Espionage detentions test whether Malaysia intelligence services can protect against state-level threats
12 foreign intelligence operatives detained. Espionage response must be proportionate and publicly accountable.
